title: Nationwide Assault Weapons Buyback Act (US)
policy_text: The federal government will require mandatory surrender of designated assault-style rifles within 12 months. Owners receive compensation at a fixed schedule funded by a national excise tax. Non-compliance carries criminal penalties. Local law enforcement may conduct compliance checks.

title: Federal Austerity and Benefit Reduction Act (US)
policy_text: To reduce the deficit, this policy cuts federal social spending by 20% across food assistance, housing vouchers, and unemployment benefits over two years, while freezing inflation adjustments. States are expected to fill gaps using local revenue.

title: National E-Verify + Legalization Pathway (US)
policy_text: All employers must use mandatory E-Verify for new and existing workers, with substantial penalties for violations. In parallel, undocumented residents with 5+ years presence can apply for legal status after background checks, fees, and tax compliance milestones.

title: Federal Carbon Tax with Household Dividend (US)
policy_text: A national carbon tax starts at $60/ton and rises annually. Revenue is returned as equal monthly household dividends, while energy-intensive sectors receive temporary transition rebates. The policy targets emissions reduction and long-term climate resilience.
